MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., for plaintiff Mercy Housing California. Mr. Ererkle Chaichmelachvili was present for Mercy Housing.
Defendant Melinda Knotts appeared in propria persona.

No settlement conference held. Parties have agreement. Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment as to property at 125 6th Street, #201, San Francisco, California filed. See scanned document. Trial date vacated. Hon. William R. Gargano. Clerk Garth Sayers. Not reported. (218)
